title: The Medicine Man.
content:
Good people if you have the mumps,
        Or ever get down with the dumps;
     Or have bad cold or aching pains,
        Or ever suffer with chilblains--
     Don't seek your doctor for advice,
        And pay him some tremendous price,
     But buy a drug that's safe and sure--
        In fact, get Blank's Consumptive Cure.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edwin C. Ranck, titled "The Medicine Man.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
